title: Trust the company, not the product.
summary: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky says buyers should “trust the company” when buying his relaunched wearables with 30-day warranties. I mean, offering a 30 day warranty makes it sound like the company itself doesn’t trust it’s product to last more than that either.
caption: output/2026-07-20/trust-the-company-not-the-product.txt
